title: Creamy Chickpea Pilaf
description: A comforting and nutritious vegetarian dish made with chickpeas, pilaf, and a creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Gradually add the chicken broth, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, until thickened.
Stir in the creamy sauce and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Add the cooked chickpeas and pilaf to the saucepan, and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
